creator: green@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thanks, Gregory, but I really do need this in KNF.  If you don't know 
about it, see style(9), but the problem here is that the whitespace 
in this file is commpletely clobbered.  I can fix smaller style 
bugs, but not a file that's almost entirely whitespace-broken. 
Why don't you submit what's needed for OpenSSH's S/KEY support in 
a PR to apply to src/lib/libskey, including the sprintf/strcpy issues 
you've uncovered?o 

I'd greatly appreciate it!
